scripts.init: pnpm run prepare:icon:production && devvit upload --config devvit.json
scripts.init:copy-paste: pnpm run prepare:icon:production && devvit upload --copy-paste --config devvit.json
scripts.dev: pnpm run prepare:icon && devvit playtest --config devvit.json
scripts.upload: pnpm run prepare:icon:production && devvit upload --config devvit.json
scripts.publish: pnpm run prepare:icon:production && devvit publish --config devvit.json
